other_constraints: JD says remote-first but does not state eligible countries, visa sponsorship, or work authorization requirements.

strengths.text: Strong full-stack TypeScript and React match, with recent production work across OpenZeppelin and Premise plus backend/API evidence in Express.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, and cloud tooling.
Product-engineering fit is credible: discovery-to-delivery work at Resit, client-facing product delivery, migration support for enterprise users, and product/engineering collaboration at Vitamina.
Lean-team and startup evidence is strong through Dxpress from idea to launch, Resit agency delivery, remote roles across multiple countries, and release-cycle improvements that cut bureaucracy.
B2B SaaS and enterprise-platform evidence is directly supported by OpenZeppelin Defender, Premise, enterprise-user migration work, and the profile summary.
AI tooling is present in the source profile through Claude, Cursor, active AI tooling side projects, and an OpenAI API proof of concept, but stronger workflow details would improve the match.

gaps.reason: The resume has end-to-end ownership evidence, including co-led and led work, but does not yet clearly state a largely solo concept-to-production feature owned independently.
Claude and Cursor are listed and AI side-project/POC evidence exists, but the source profile does not explain how AI tools are integrated into day-to-day engineering workflow.
The profile supports AI tooling interest, but not explicit experience shaping AI-augmented delivery-team practices.
Product and customer collaboration are present, but the source profile does not explicitly name direct PM partnership in recent roles.
React, TypeScript, Express.js, GraphQL, and Apollo evidence is strong, but NestJS is not recorded in info.json.
PostgreSQL, Redis, GraphQL, Apollo, and RabbitMQ are present, but NestJS is absent and RabbitMQ appears only in skills rather than role evidence.
No HR tech, talent acquisition, recruiting platform, interview intelligence, or assessment-domain work is recorded in info.json.
AI product and tooling evidence exists, but no direct hiring, assessment, or HR-tech domain signal is recorded.

resume_focus_priority.focus: Lead with TypeScript, React, full-stack production feature ownership, and API/GraphQL work.
Show product-engineering judgment: discovery, end-user focus, architecture trade-offs, production ownership, and direct customer context.
Add grounded AI-workflow language around Claude, Cursor, OpenAI API experiments, and practical use of AI tools without overstating formal AAD leadership.
Highlight startup, early-stage, B2B SaaS, enterprise-user, and high-trust remote collaboration evidence.
Use stack keywords naturally where grounded: GraphQL, Apollo, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Express.js as NestJS-adjacent Node backend evidence.

keyword_usage.action: repeat in summary, OpenZeppelin, Premise, and skills because it is strongly backed.
repeat in summary and recent role bullets because it is strongly backed.
use prominently in title/summary and selected bullets where frontend plus backend ownership is supported.
use in summary/cover letter as positioning, backed by discovery, client, PM/product-team, and end-user examples.
use cautiously around Claude, Cursor, OpenAI API, and AI tooling side projects unless the user adds stronger workflow examples.
repeat in Premise and skills with Apollo evidence.
do not claim experience; mention Express.js/Node.js as similar backend evidence only.
use in summary and cover letter, backed by source summary and OpenZeppelin/Premise evidence.
do not claim unless the user supplies new evidence; can express mission interest in cover letter.
